generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; consumer GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: Only sourced money events are written as facts. Unsupported founder cash, margin, burn, loss, CAC, refund or subsidy amounts remain in research_gaps.

founder_background: 魏基栋 Jayden Wei: Local report identifies Wei as founder/CEO with DJI RoboMaster and robotics background; do not expand beyond public/company sources.
Mammotion / AgileX robotics team: Base report connects Mammotion to AgileX and robotics navigation experience; team-level capability is part of the GTM story.
brand_timeline: 2022: crowdfunding $3.37M - Local report records LUBA Kickstarter at about $3.37M, a category-launch proof point.
2022-2024: crowdfunding_total $5.57M - Base report records two Kickstarter campaigns totaling about $5.57M; verify final campaign pages before investor-grade use.
2024: revenue RMB 522M - Local base report records mower revenue around RMB 522M and about 30K units in 2024.
2025: supply_commitment 1.2M lidar units - Local base report records a 1.2M-unit lidar supply agreement as a scale signal, not cash revenue.

research_gaps: Exact VC round amounts from Sequoia/FiveY/Vertex are described as large local-report signals but need primary funding source before writing exact CNY amount.
No reliable public data for refund loss, warranty reserve, CAC or gross margin by SKU.
Live accessory prices should be pulled from official store by region before quoting to buyers.

gtm_extension.summary: Mammotion 的 GTM 是“大疆系机器人技术 + Kickstarter 验证 + Amazon/DTC 爆发 + 线下零售扩张”的庭院机器人出海样本。它用 RTK、视觉和激光雷达把传统埋线割草机升级为无边界机器人，再用 LUBA/YUKA/SPINO 把单品扩成庭院智能生态。风险是高客单产品的售后、安装、地图稳定性和季节性需求，一旦支持跟不上，技术领先会被差评抵消。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: Mammotion 的 GTM 是“大疆系机器人技术 + Kickstarter 验证 + Amazon/DTC 爆发 + 线下零售扩张”的庭院机器人出海样本。
channel_path: AgileX / DJI RoboMaster background builds robotics credibility
Kickstarter validates LUBA demand and collects first global users
DTC and Amazon convert early adopters
Retailers such as Lowe’s/Costco/Walmart broaden mainstream yard-care reach
SPINO and accessories extend from mowing to yard ecosystem

channels.dtc: Official site/store is the clearest conversion path and pricing source.
channels.ecommerce: Marketplaces, retailers, and regional stores broaden reach beyond owned traffic.
channels.pr_media: Reviews, launch events, and credible media explain why the product deserves attention.
channels.community: User reviews, forums, creator content, or owner communities decide whether early demand becomes trust.
channels.service: Warranty, repair, delivery, setup, installation, and support determine long-term brand quality.
channels.crowdfunding: Kickstarter reduced category-launch risk and created proof for retailers.
channels.retailers: Big-box retail matters because lawn care buyers want return/support confidence.

business_model.pricing_logic: Premium robotic mower pricing justified by wire-free setup and navigation stack.
business_model.channel_economics: High hardware gross ticket must fund support, seasonal inventory and regional service coverage.

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品或产品线；按公开证据、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和用户购买决策选择。

top_products.name: LUBA 2 / LUBA 3 AWD
top_products.why_selected: LUBA is the flagship proof of Mammotion’s boundary-free mower thesis.
top_products.origin_story: Team translated robotics/AGV navigation into consumer lawn care.
top_products.pre_market: Pre-market users wanted no perimeter wire, reliable mapping and slope handling.
top_products.innovation: Tri-Fusion navigation, AWD, RTK / NetRTK, AI vision and in LUBA 3 lidar mapping.
top_products.breakout: The Verge reports LUBA 3 AWD starts at $2,399 and extends Mammotion’s premium range.
top_products.customer_impact: Users buy back mowing time but expect appliance-level reliability.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It pushes traditional mower brands toward wire-free navigation.

pricing_model.product_price: The Verge reports LUBA 3 AWD starting at $2,399 / £2,099 / €2,299; local report gives LUBA 2 premium range roughly $2,599-$4,999.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Software boundary: mapping/app/OTA are part of core product; no reliable mandatory subscription is written. NetRTK/4G availability and fees must be checked by region.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: RTK station, garage, replacement blades, wheel/charging parts, 4G connectivity and warranty/service are real total-cost items.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Husqvarna EPOS models can reach $5,899; Segway Navimow and Worx Landroid compete across lower and mid tiers; Dreame/Eufy challenge with camera-based approaches.

sources.title: The Verge Mammotion LUBA 3 AWD CES 2026

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把找不到来源的自筹金额、毛利、亏损或补贴硬写进报告。
不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

sources.title: The Verge Mammotion LUBA 3 AWD CES 2026

top_products.name: YUKA / YUKA Mini
top_products.why_selected: YUKA brings Mammotion into smaller lawns and more affordable segments.
top_products.origin_story: After LUBA proved premium demand, Mammotion needed a lower-entry model and auto-empty/lawn-sweeping story.
top_products.pre_market: Users compare setup complexity, lawn size, RTK placement and app quality.
top_products.innovation: YUKA Mini review reports compact wire-free mowing with AI camera and RTK station.
top_products.breakout: It gives Mammotion more price coverage against Segway/Dreame/Eufy.
top_products.customer_impact: Small-yard users can enter below LUBA pricing while accepting setup learning curve.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It broadens Mammotion from high-end yards to mainstream suburban lawns.

pricing_model.product_price: TechRadar reports Yuka Mini S in US at $1,099; 600H $1,099 and 800H $1,299; UK/AU model prices vary.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Software/subscription boundary: app, mapping and core mowing are included; no mandatory software subscription is written.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: charging station, RTK receiver, blades, garage and replacement consumables; setup support has hidden time cost.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Dreame E15, Eufy robot mower and Segway Navimow compete in lower-to-mid price tiers; LUBA Mini AWD 800 review lists $1,599 as a mid-high option.

sources.title: T3 Mammotion Luba Mini AWD review

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。

top_products.name: SPINO / yard ecosystem accessories
top_products.why_selected: SPINO shows Mammotion wants to own the yard, not only grass.
top_products.origin_story: Pool cleaning shares outdoor robotics, navigation and affluent-home customer overlap with mowing.
top_products.pre_market: Users need proof the brand can support multiple expensive outdoor robots.
top_products.innovation: Extends robotics stack into pool cleaning and yard maintenance accessories.
top_products.breakout: It raises ceiling from mower company to outdoor home robotics platform.
top_products.customer_impact: Customers can buy a broader yard-care system but face more support dependency.
top_products.ecosystem_impact: It follows DJI-style adjacent-category expansion: same capability, adjacent use case.

pricing_model.product_price: SPINO live price varies by SKU/region; use Mammotion official store for current quote.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No mandatory subscription is written; app/software service boundary should be checked per SKU.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: brushes, filters, blades, docks/garages, RTK parts and replacement consumables affect total cost.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Aiper, Beatbot, Dolphin/Maytronics and Wybot compete in pool robots; Husqvarna/Segway compete in mowers, so Mammotion’s ecosystem must justify cross-category trust.

what_to_learn: 把产品本体价格、配件服务费、软件订阅费和竞品总成本放在同一张账上。
GTM 的重点是让用户相信长期价值，而不是只看首发声量。
创始人履历和公司资本链条要分开写，避免把人物叙事当成财务事实。

不要复制表面的发布会打法，先确认供应链、售后和复购逻辑。

learning_summary: Mammotion 的第一性原理是用更高级机器人能力解决传统庭院维护痛点。
众筹到 Amazon 到线下零售是一条清晰放大路径，但售后必须跟上高客单价。
从 LUBA 到 SPINO 的生态扩张只有在服务体系成熟时才成立。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 找不到的内容不补写；缺失的创始人现金、单台毛利、广告投放、退货损失、售后成本留在 research_gaps。
